repository.description: Space-inspired React component library with AI-augmented workflows

commit.message:
Improve drag & drop UX, fix status bar, and enhance session behavior

Drag & Drop:
- Custom drag overlay with stacked file-type icons (semi-transparent layers)
- Modifier key polling via zero-jitter SetCursorPos trick
- Internal drag: hide default WinUI visual, show rich icon+filename+badge
- External drag: operation text tooltip matching app font settings
- Cross-tab Move now refreshes inactive source tabs automatically

Status Bar:
- Use focused column (IsActive) instead of always last column
- Update status bar on every column focus change
- Selection count based on SelectedItems.Count (not stale SelectedChild)

Session:
- Always start with single pane (split view not restored on launch)
- ShortcutHelper for .lnk file creation via COM IShellLink

ActionLog:
- Error filter button with red badge count
- Undo/Redo operation logging
- Compress/Extract icon glyph mappings
- LogEntryDisplayHelper extracted for testability
- Unit tests for ActionLogService and LogEntryDisplayHelper

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: SpanFinder
repository.description: A blazing-fast Miller Columns file explorer for Windows — multi-tab, split view, 10 themes, keyboard-first

commit.message:
fix(reconciliation): REPs now match ingreso movements + RFC direction filter

Two bugs fixed:
1. Direction filter excluded REPs (tipo=P) for abonos — now includes them
2. REP block had no RFC filter — added: ingreso→rfc_emisor=business, egreso→rfc_receptor=business

This unblocks matching of Feb REPs against Jan/Feb bank movements for ingresos.

commit.message:
Add Constellation Mastery Course with rotation quiz

- Replace start screen with 21-stage learning curriculum across 6 phases
  (Identify/Find × Famous/Familiar/Expert); phases unlock linearly as
  stages are mastered (100% on one full pool pass), saved in localStorage
- Recentre all 88 constellations: bounding-box centre → new ra/dec,
  fov = 2·atan(bbox_half_diagonal × 1.15) so constellation fits the
  inscribed circle at any rotation angle; re-download all photos
- Rotation difficulty: each quiz question shown at a random angle in a
  circular viewport (border-radius 50%); reveal restores square viewport
  for non-photo modes; photo mode preserves circle + rotation on reveal
- Star labels drawn after rotation restore so text stays upright;
  rotateProj() maps unrotated canvas positions to screen positions;
  drawArtwork() rotates anchor dstPts so artwork aligns to rotated scene

commit.message:
feat: use t-distribution for confidence interval margins (#760)

* feat: use t-distribution for confidence interval margins (#752)

Replace the unprincipled 1/confidence_factor margin inflation with
t_critical(df) × standard_error, using a lookup table for common
degrees of freedom (1–120) with linear interpolation.

commit.message:
feat: close 10 Anthropic driver gaps + optimize time context injection

- Tool result 50K cap as global safety net (conversation.py)
- Compaction payload stripping: base64 removal + 2K cap for summarizer (compaction.py)
- Mid-stream abort: flush partial text/thinking blocks (anthropic.py)
- Effective context window: use available instead of raw max_context_tokens
- Dedup save_message via MD5 hash of consecutive calls (conversation.py)
- Schema caching with invalidation on register/unregister (registry.py)
- Time context: 6 DB queries → 1 batch, ~30 lines → 6 lines compact format,
  skip SERVER when same as SYNE, UTC always English, helpers to module-level
- Subagent parallel tool execution via asyncio.gather

v0.26.7

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

enemy AI AoE attacks, heals, and buffs.

commit.message:
fix: persist upgrade_items in saves and restore defaults for old saves

upgrade_items was never serialized, so loading a save lost all class
upgrade eligibility. Now saves include upgrade_items, and old saves
without the field fall back to the class default via a new lookup in
FighterDB.get_default_upgrade_items().

commit.message:
Fix migration for legacy { symbol: shares } holdings format

Legacy Apex_Portfolio.json stores holdings as { "NOW": 14 } (symbol → shares count)
not { "NOW": { shares: 14, ... } }. The migrate script checked holding.shares which
was undefined for numbers, skipping all holdings. Now handles both formats and pulls
entry prices/dates from holdingTheses.

New command reads stored XML files (fallback to xml_data JSON) and populates
cfdi_payments via firstOrCreate. Supports --rfc= to target a specific RFC
and --dry-run for inspection.

feat(Matching): 添加 GreedyNMS 对齐反编译 sub_18004C8C0 — 旋转矩形 NMS + 距离预过滤

FindScaledShapeModel: SearchPyramid 返回后插入 NonMaxSuppressionOverlap 调用,
消除缩放匹配的重复候选 (applyNMS=false 由 FinalizeResults 跳过, 改为独立调用)

NonMaxSuppressionOverlap: 添加距离预过滤优化 (distThresh = (halfW²+halfH²)*4.0),
远距离候选对直接跳过昂贵的 OBB 交集计算; OBB corners 改为 lazy compute

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

repository.description: Industrial machine vision library in C++17 - OpenCV-free implementation targeting Halcon-level precision

commit.message:
v3: switch to crop-margin method, drop unreliable zoom variable

The vlc.var.set(vout, "zoom", N) variable behaves inconsistently
across VLC versions. Replace it entirely with individual crop-margin
variables (crop-left, crop-top, crop-right, crop-bottom) which VLC
auto-stretches to fill the window. Crop alone IS zoom.

2x centre zoom on 1920x1080 now sets:
  crop-left=480, crop-top=270, crop-right=480, crop-bottom=270
VLC stretches the remaining 960x540 centre to fill the window.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(ci): fix YAML parse error in auto-review workflow (#251)

The multi-line --data-urlencode text argument had lines with zero
indentation (PR: ${PR_TITLE}, ${PR_URL}), which YAML parsed as keys
outside the run: | block, causing "workflow file issue" with 0 jobs
on every PR.

Fix: build the message with printf into a variable first.

Co-authored-by: David Andrews <david@supergeri.com>

feat(guild-2): Build parallel task execution engine (#3)

Implement the TaskRunner for parallel task execution using tokio:
- TaskRunner struct with configurable concurrency limit
- RunMode enum: FailFast (default) stops scheduling on failure, Continue keeps going
- RunResult tracks success/failure/skipped counts and per-task timing
- Streams stdout/stderr with [project-name] prefixes in color
- Respects dependency ordering from TaskGraph

Includes comprehensive tests for:
- Single task execution (success and failure)
- Dependency ordering verification
- Parallel execution of independent tasks
- Fail-fast and continue modes
- Concurrency limiting
- Diamond dependency patterns

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(hooks): pre_edit_guard injecte le domain rule (structurel, pas behavioral)

Au lieu d'un reminder "lis ce fichier", le hook lit lui-même le domain
rule et l'injecte dans le contexte Claude avant chaque Edit/Write.

- Rules courtes (≤120L) : injection intégrale
- Rules longues : frontmatter + sections clés (Non-Negotiables,
  Invariants, Interdictions, Arborescence, Contraintes) — cap 100L
- Résultat : domain rule toujours présente dans contexte avant édition
  → enforcement structurel, impossible à ignorer

commit.message:
Fix all compiler warnings and add CTest-based test

C fixes:
- byteswapIO.c: suppress warn_unused_result on fread via wrapper function
- diskmalloc.c: fix %d->%zu for size_t, replace mktemp with mkstemp,
  remove invalid extern int errno
- 2dsola.lanczos.c: remove unused argc/argv parameters

Fortran fixes:
- ran.f: add SAVE for persistent state, replace PAUSE with STOP
- miscsub.f: replace PAUSE with STOP, remove unused labels
- target.f: remove unused labels
- splitsub.f: simplify xl initialization to avoid false-positive warning
- kersub.n.f: replace tabs with spaces, initialize nrst1
- covariance.f: add explicit int() cast for REAL(8)->INTEGER(4)
- 2dsola.main.lanczos.f: remove unused format label 904

Build system:
- Enable -Wall for C and Fortran with appropriate suppressions for
  inherent F77 idioms (-Wno-conversion, -Wno-surprising, -std=legacy,
  -fno-automatic)
- Add CTest small_test that exercises both set-2drls and 2dsola

Also adds CLAUDE.md and updates README.md with test instructions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix CORS preflight blocking dashboard API calls

Browser sends OPTIONS preflight for custom X-API-Key header.
Auth middleware was rejecting it with 401. Added CORS middleware
before auth to handle OPTIONS and set Access-Control-Allow-Headers.
Also improved error messaging for invalid API key vs disconnected.

- Add Domain Security Policy page (/admin/security-settings) with HTTPS/transport toggles,
  security headers table, CORS config, and domain verification via security-headers-check edge function
- Create k2c-processor edge function — auto-generates K2C donations on billing events,

fix: resolve dashboard load failure after login

Fix token refresh race condition where concurrent 401s from Promise.all
both tried to refresh the same single-use token. Add refresh mutex so
only one refresh happens at a time. Guard backend dashboard endpoint
sections with try/except to return safe defaults on partial failures.
Fix response_rate display (ratio → percentage) and sync DashboardData
type with actual backend response.

commit.message:
GSD Engine v2.0.0: 9 new scripts, 14 validation gates, speed + compliance + intelligence

New patch scripts (22-30):
- patch-gsd-differential-review: git-diff based code review (40-60% token savings)
- patch-gsd-pre-execute-gate: compile validation before git commit
- patch-gsd-acceptance-tests: auto-generated per-requirement acceptance tests
- patch-gsd-api-contract-validation: OpenAPI spec compliance scanning
- patch-gsd-visual-validation: Figma screenshot comparison via Playwright
- patch-gsd-design-token-enforcement: zero-cost regex scan for hardcoded CSS values
- patch-gsd-compliance-engine: per-iteration SEC/COMP rules, DB migration integrity, PII flow tracking
- patch-gsd-speed-optimizations: conditional research skip, smart batch sizing, incremental file map, prompt dedup
- patch-gsd-agent-intelligence: performance scoring, data-driven agent routing, warm-start patterns

Updated:
- install-gsd-all.ps1: v2.0.0, 30 core scripts
- All 5 docs updated with new scripts, configs, and chapters 16-18
- Developer guide docx regenerated
